scripts.build: npm run build -w zod-crud && npm run build -w @zod-crud/site && npm run build -w @zod-crud/outliner && npm run build -w @zod-crud/mobile-cms
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w zod-crud && npm run typecheck -w @zod-crud/site && npm run typecheck -w @zod-crud/outliner && npm run typecheck -w @zod-crud/mobile-cms
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build && npm run smoke:package
